author: li-chenyan
body:
Add L1T calo configs for the 2026PbPb run with updated centrality trigger threshold using CENT0-6.

PR validation:
These files represent L1 configuration to be stored centrally, and are not involved in any central workflows.

Backported to 16_1_X
title: [17_0_X][L1T] Changed the CENT Threshold and LUT for PbPb 2026 run
